name: Commercial
blurb: Older commercial buildings facing a code-triggered upgrade or a tenant-driven change in loading. Concrete and masonry strengthening sized to the engineer of record's drawings.

name: Industrial
blurb: Plants and facilities where columns, beams, and slabs carry equipment and process loads. FRP strengthening and industrial floor coatings in one mobilization where the scope allows.

name: Multifamily
blurb: Apartment and mixed-use assets, including unreinforced masonry and soft-story stock subject to California retrofit ordinances. FRP often forms part of a larger envelope upgrade.
